product_information.product_name: Dolce & Gabbana Light Blue pour Homme eau de toilette 40 ML
product_information.description: Een frisse geur met noten van o.a. bergamot, mandarijn, jenever, rozemarijn, rozenhout, wierook en eikenmos.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: alcohol, aqua (water), parfum (fragrance), linalool, limonene, ethylhexylmethoxycinnamate, diethylamino hydroxybenzoyl, hexyl benzoate, hexyl cinnamal, geraniol, alpha-isomethyl ionone, citral, citronellol, isoeugenol, bht, ci 60730 (ext violet 2) ci 42090 (blue 1) ci 19140 (yellow 5)
